sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الْكَاتِبُ الشَّابُّ أَمَامَ وَرَقَةٍ بَيْضَاءَ فَارِغَةٍ لِسَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladi pisac je satima sjedio pred praznim bijelim listom papira.
sentences.translationEn: The young writer sat before a blank white page for long hours.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُفَكِّرُ فِي أَيِّ كَلِمَةٍ يَبْدَأُ بِهَا قِصَّتَهُ الأُولَى.
sentences.translation: Razmišljao je kojom riječju da počne svoju prvu priču.
sentences.translationEn: He thought about which word to begin his first story with.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ كَتَبَ جُمْلَةً وَاحِدَةً، فَجُمْلَتَيْنِ، فَصَفْحَةً كَامِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Zatim je napisao jednu rečenicu, pa dvije, pa cijelu stranicu.
sentences.translationEn: Then he wrote one sentence, then two, then a full page.

sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ الْوَقْتَ وَالْجُوعَ وَكُلَّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ حَوْلِهِ.
sentences.translation: Zaboravio je na vrijeme, glad i sve oko sebe.
sentences.translationEn: He forgot about time, hunger, and everything around him.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ انْتَهَى، شَعَرَ بِسَعَادَةٍ لَمْ يَشْعُرْ بِمِثْلِهَا مِنْ قَبْلُ، فَعَرَفَ أَنَّهُ وَجَدَ حُبَّهُ الْحَقِيقِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Kad je završio, osjetio je radost kakvu nikad ranije nije osjetio i shvatio da je pronašao svoju pravu ljubav.
sentences.translationEn: When he finished, he felt a happiness he had never felt before, and he knew he had found his true calling.
